titleStmt.title: SII 28.118: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 118. (A.R. No. 273 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra south wall.

Records a royal order to several individuals (officials) engaged in the administration of the temple to have the record of the gifts made by Arayaṉ Poṉṉambala-kkūttaṉ alias Nandi-paṉmaṉ, the kilāṉ of Vallam in Tiruvārūrkūṟṟam in Gēya-māṇikka-vaḷaṉāḍu, inscribed in the tiru-māḷigai of Āḷuḍaiyār. The gifts consisted of-

1) 3/4 (vēli) of land forming part of the garden named Poṉṉambalakūttaṉ purchased and left in the charge of Balāśrayaṉ Kumaraṉ Tāyaṉ a member of the body, mūla-parushai, who was measuring out flowers for Āḷuḍaiyār;

2) another plot of land (not specified) meant to finance the ilakkai and koṟṟu to the kuḍis, twenty in number, who were alloted for tending the above garden, which was purchased and given as nandavanappuṟam and made dēvadāna-iṟai-ili and entrusted to the charge of Māṅguḍaiyāṉ-Māṇikka-kkūttaṉ. Apparently the royal intervention was required for making the plots as mentioned above dēvadānaiṟai-ili.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyumiḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭu virābhiṣekamum vijayābhiṣekamum paṇṇi Aruḷiṉa śrītribhuvaṉaviradevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattiraṇṭu nāḷ nūṟṟu Aṟupatu toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum maturāntakap pirammarāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukku sāmutāyat tirumāḷikaikkūṟu tillai Ampalappallarāyaṉum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyattiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurkkūṟṟattu vallaṅkiḻāṉ Arayaṉ poṉṉampalakkūttaṉāṉa nantipaṉmaṉ rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭup perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai koyilil pūṇṭiyil kollai ni
lattile mukkāl nilam mulaparuṣaiyāril pālaśrayaṉ kumaraṉ tāyaṉ Eṉpāṉoruvaṉ perile vilaikoṇṭu Āḷuṭaiyārkkup poṉṉampalakkūttaṉeṉṉum perāl tirunantavaṉañ ceytu tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷappittu vārā niṉṟāṉeṉṟum Ittirunantavaṉattukkuk kuṭikaḷāka Irupatu per mutal koḷḷavum Ipperkku Ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum Ivaṉ virutarājapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkāṉāṭṭut tiyākavalliccaruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai ceruntimaṅkalattu pakkalum māṅkuṭaiyāṉ māṇikkak kūttaṉeṉpāṉoruvaṉ perile vilaikoṇṭu muppattiraṇṭāvatu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭuvittu nantavaṉappuṟamāka viṭṭāṉeṉṟum Ippaṭikku Āḷuṭaiyār koyiṟ tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavuṅ kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇu
meṉṟu nantipaṉmaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai rājentiraciṅka muventa veḷāṉeṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai villavarāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai ciṅkaḷarāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai Iṉakarāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai vicayarāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai cittirāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai muventirayaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai viḻiñattarayaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai vāṇādhirāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai toṇṭaimāṉeḻuttu EṉContinuation missing.
Digital edition of SII 28.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
